sentiment: Every creation begins with the universe — we build buttons and melodies alike from what we remember wanting.

stories.title: The lost joy of music piracy
stories.summary: A meditation on the lost culture of music piracy — the discovery, curation, and community that platforms like What.cd and Oink fostered before streaming flattened the experience.

stories.title: If you want to create a button from scratch, you must first create the universe
stories.summary: Building accessible UI from first principles — every element carries the weight of the entire system behind it, and getting the fundamentals right matters more than polish.
